privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world San Francisco parcel, building, and job data contained within the sanfran_public.h5 file. It requires generating an analysis notebook at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/notebooks/micro_enterprise_analysis.ipynb. A target output CSV must be generated at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/top_micro_enterprise_zones.csv with exactly 15 rows and 9 specifically named columns ('zone_id', 'total_business_bldgs', 'micro_small_bldgs', 'medium_bldgs', 'large_bldgs', 'micro_small_bldg_pct', 'total_jobs', 'micro_small_jobs', 'micro_small_job_pct'). A horizontal stacked bar chart plot must also be generated at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/business_size_composition.png.
